userText: My teacher is conducting survey to realize his students.
correctedText: My teacher is conducting a survey to understand his students better.
generalAdvice: 这次记住了 conducting，是进步。两个问题：survey 前缺冠词，realize 在英文里是'意识到/突然明白'，不是'了解'。

issues.note: conducting survey 缺少不定冠词：conducting a survey。
issues.suggestion: 可数名词单数前检查是否需要 a / an：a survey, a plan, an experiment。

issues.note: realize 是'意识到、突然明白'，不是'了解'。了解学生应该用 understand his students 或 get to know his students。
issues.suggestion: realize = suddenly understand or become aware of something. 想表达'了解某人'时，优先用 understand 或 get to know。
